parameter.name: SkillLinkDB-Web.config Connection String
parameter.description: SkillLinkDB Connection String used in web.config by the application to access the database.
parameter.defaultValue: Server=tcp:skilllink-server.database.windows.net,1433;Initial Catalog=SkillLinkDB;Persist Security Info=False;User ID=ADMIN123;Password=!link123;MultipleActiveResultSets=False;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;Max Pool Size=50;Min Pool Size=0;
